tEn: Hunyuan3D 2.5: Towards High-Fidelity 3D Assets Generation with Ultimate Details
tZh: Hunyuan3D 2.5：迈向具有极致细节的高保真3D资产生成
sEn: Hunyuan3D 2.5 significantly advances 3D asset generation with a 10B-parameter shape model and PBR texture generation.
sZh: Hunyuan3D 2.5 通过10B参数形状模型和PBR纹理生成，显著推进了3D资产生成技术。
absEn: In this report, we present Hunyuan3D 2.5, a robust suite of 3D diffusion models aimed at generating high-fidelity and detailed textured 3D assets. Hunyuan3D 2.5 follows two-stages pipeline of its previous version Hunyuan3D 2.0, while demonstrating substantial advancements in both shape and texture generation. In terms of shape generation, we introduce a new shape foundation model -- LATTICE, which is trained with scaled high-quality datasets, model-size, and compute. Our largest model reaches 10B parameters and generates sharp and detailed 3D shape with precise image-3D following while keeping mesh surface clean and smooth, significantly closing the gap between generated and handcrafted 3D shapes. In terms of texture generation, it is upgraded with phyiscal-based rendering (PBR) via a novel multi-view architecture extended from Hunyuan3D 2.0 Paint model. Our extensive evaluation shows that Hunyuan3D 2.5 significantly outperforms previous methods in both shape and end-to-end texture generation.
absZh: 本报告介绍了Hunyuan3D 2.5，这是一个强大的3D扩散模型套件，旨在生成高保真且细节丰富的纹理3D资产。Hunyuan3D 2.5沿用了其前身Hunyuan3D 2.0的两阶段流水线，同时在形状和纹理生成方面展示了显著进步。在形状生成方面，我们引入了一个新的形状基础模型——LATTICE，该模型通过大规模高质量数据集、模型规模和计算量进行训练。我们最大的模型达到了10B参数，能够生成清晰且细节丰富的3D形状，具有精确的图像-3D跟随能力，同时保持网格表面干净光滑，显著缩小了生成形状与手工制作形状之间的差距。在纹理生成方面，通过从Hunyuan3D 2.0 Paint模型扩展而来的新颖多视图架构，升级了基于物理的渲染（PBR）。我们的广泛评估表明，Hunyuan3D 2.5在形状和端到端纹理生成方面均显著优于以往方法。

contrib.en: Introduces LATTICE, a 10B-parameter shape foundation model trained on scaled high-quality data.
contrib.zh: 提出LATTICE，一个基于高质量数据规模扩张训练的100亿参数形状基础模型。

contrib.en: Achieves sharp, detailed 3D shapes with precise image-3D alignment and smooth surfaces.
contrib.zh: 生成锐利、细节丰富的3D形状，实现精确的图像-3D对齐和光滑表面。

contrib.en: Extends texture generation to PBR materials via a novel multi-view architecture with dual-channel attention.
contrib.zh: 通过新颖的多视图架构和双通道注意力机制，将纹理生成扩展到PBR材质。

contrib.en: Proposes a dual-phase resolution enhancement strategy for better texture-geometry alignment.
contrib.zh: 提出双阶段分辨率增强策略，改善纹理与几何的对齐质量。

contrib.en: Outperforms state-of-the-art open-source and commercial models in shape and texture generation.
contrib.zh: 在形状和纹理生成上超越最先进的开源和商业模型。

contrib.en: Demonstrates stable improvement with model scaling, closing the gap to handcrafted 3D assets.
contrib.zh: 展示了模型规模扩张带来的稳定提升，缩小了与手工3D资产的差距。

limits.en: Evaluation metrics like ULIP and Uni3D may not fully capture visual quality improvements.
limits.zh: ULIP和Uni3D等评估指标可能无法完全反映视觉质量的提升。

limits.en: High-resolution multi-view training requires substantial memory, limiting view count.
limits.zh: 高分辨率多视图训练需要大量内存，限制了视图数量。

limits.en: PBR material generation still faces challenges in decoupling illumination from albedo.
limits.zh: PBR材质生成在从反照率中解耦光照方面仍面临挑战。

limits.en: The model's performance on extremely complex or rare object categories is not extensively tested.
limits.zh: 模型在极其复杂或罕见物体类别上的性能未经过广泛测试。

limits.en: Inference speed may be limited due to multi-step sampling and high-resolution processing.
limits.zh: 由于多步采样和高分辨率处理，推理速度可能受限。

items.en: In this report, we present Hunyuan3D 2.5, a robust suite of 3D diffusion models aimed at generating high-fidelity and detailed textured 3D assets. Hunyuan3D 2.5 follows two-stages pipeline of its previous version Hunyuan3D 2.0, while demonstrating substantial advancements in both shape and texture generation. In terms of shape generation, we introduce a new shape foundation model – LATTICE, which is trained with scaled high-quality datasets, model-size, and compute. Our largest model reaches 10B parameters and generates sharp and detailed 3D shape with precise image-3D following while keeping mesh surface clean and smooth, significantly closing the gap between generated and handcrafted 3D shapes. In terms of texture generation, it is upgraded with phyiscal-based rendering (PBR) via a novel multi-view architecture extended from Hunyuan3D 2.0 Paint model. Our extensive evaluation shows that Hunyuan3D 2.5 significantly outperforms previous methods in both shape and end-to-end texture generation.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们提出了Hunyuan3D 2.5，这是一个强大的3D扩散模型套件，旨在生成高保真且细节丰富的纹理化3D资产。Hunyuan3D 2.5沿用了其前身Hunyuan3D 2.0的两阶段流程，同时在形状和纹理生成方面均取得了显著进步。在形状生成方面，我们引入了一个新的形状基础模型——LATTICE，该模型通过大规模高质量数据集、模型规模和算力的扩展进行训练。我们最大的模型达到100亿参数，能够生成清晰且细节丰富的3D形状，并实现精确的图像-3D跟随，同时保持网格表面干净光滑，显著缩小了生成形状与手工制作形状之间的差距。在纹理生成方面，通过从Hunyuan3D 2.0 Paint模型扩展而来的新颖多视图架构，升级为基于物理的渲染（PBR）。我们的广泛评估表明，Hunyuan3D 2.5在形状和端到端纹理生成方面均显著优于以往方法。

items.capEn: Figure 1: High quality 3D assets generated by Hunyuan3D 2.5.

items.en: 3D generation has rapidly developed in recent years, becoming a core driver of innovation and growth across various industries. From game development to embodied AI, from film special effects to virtual reality, the application scenarios of 3D models continue to expand, demonstrating their immense potential and value. With advancements in artificial intelligence, 3D generation has become more efficient and powerful, particularly in areas such as automated modeling and texturing, further simplifying the creative process and enhancing production efficiency.
items.zh: 近年来，3D生成技术迅速发展，成为各行业创新和增长的核心驱动力。从游戏开发到具身AI，从电影特效到虚拟现实，3D模型的应用场景不断扩大，展现出巨大的潜力和价值。随着人工智能的进步，3D生成变得更加高效和强大，特别是在自动建模和纹理化等领域，进一步简化了创作流程并提高了生产效率。

items.en: Notably, recent 3D shape diffusion models based on 3dshape2vecset (Zhang et al., 2023) have pioneered a revolution in the 3D shape generation pipeline, as demonstrated by works such as CLAY (Zhang et al., 2024b), Hunyuan3D 2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025), and TripoSG (Li et al., 2025). Direct3D (Wu et al., 2024b),from another aspect, shown the potential of compressing and generating the shape via triplane. More recently, Trellis (Xiang et al., 2024) has emerged as a promising pipeline for high-quality textured 3D generation, leveraging its invented structured 3D latents as representations. Nevertheless, existing models are still limited for generating complex objects with finegrained details as demonstrated in figure 2. It remains an open problem how we could generate high-fidelity and detailed shape while maintaining smooth surface and sharp edges.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，基于3dshape2vecset（Zhang等人，2023）的最新3D形状扩散模型开创了3D形状生成流程的革命，如CLAY（Zhang等人，2024b）、Hunyuan3D 2.0（Zhao等人，2025）和TripoSG（Li等人，2025）等工作所示。另一方面，Direct3D（Wu等人，2024b）展示了通过triplane压缩和生成形状的潜力。最近，Trellis（Xiang等人，2024）作为一种有前景的高质量纹理化3D生成流程出现，利用其发明的结构化3D潜变量作为表示。尽管如此，现有模型在生成具有精细细节的复杂对象方面仍然有限，如图2所示。如何生成高保真且细节丰富的形状，同时保持表面光滑和边缘锐利，仍然是一个开放问题。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Drawbacks of existing methods: failure at detail generation and incorrect PBR.
items.capZh: 图2：现有方法的缺点：细节生成失败和错误的PBR。

items.en: High-quality textures play a crucial role in enhancing the visual realism and detail representation of 3D assets. Recently, Numerous texture generation methods based on multiview diffusion (Zhao et al., 2025; Huang et al., 2024b; Vainer et al., 2024b; Li et al., 2024a; Tang et al., 2025; Long et al., 2024; Wang & Shi, 2023; Shi et al., 2023b; a) have emerged, alleviating global consistency issue of inpainting-based methods (Huang et al., 2024a; Wu et al., 2024a; Zhang et al., 2024c; Ceylan et al., 2024; Zeng et al., 2024a; Chen et al., 2023a; Richardson et al., 2023) and synchronization techniques (Liu et al., 2025; Gao et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024a; Zhang et al., 2024a). However, challenges remain in generating highly consistent multiview images, which can lead to artifacts and seams during the fusion and baking stages. Moreover, traditional RGB textures can no longer meet the demands for photorealistic 3D asset generation, while PBR material generation solution is not available in open source community.
items.zh: 高质量纹理在增强3D资产的视觉真实感和细节表示方面起着关键作用。近年来，基于多视图扩散的纹理生成方法（Zhao等人，2025；Huang等人，2024b；Vainer等人，2024b；Li等人，2024a；Tang等人，2025；Long等人，2024；Wang & Shi，2023；Shi等人，2023b；a）大量涌现，缓解了基于修补的方法（Huang等人，2024a；Wu等人，2024a；Zhang等人，2024c；Ceylan等人，2024；Zeng等人，2024a；Chen等人，2023a；Richardson等人，2023）和同步技术（Liu等人，2025；Gao等人，2024；Liu等人，2024a；Zhang等人，2024a）的全局一致性问题。然而，生成高度一致的多视图图像仍然面临挑战，这可能导致融合和烘焙阶段出现伪影和接缝。此外，传统的RGB纹理已无法满足逼真3D资产生成的需求，而开源社区中尚无PBR材质生成解决方案。

items.en: This report presents Hunyuan3D 2.5, a robust suite of 3D diffusion models aimed at generating high-fidelity and detailed textured 3D assets. Hunyuan3D 2.5 builds upon the two-stage pipeline of its predecessor Hunyuan3D 2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025) and 2.1 (Hunyuan3D et al., 2025), while showcasing significant advancements in both shape generation and texture synthesis.
items.zh: 本报告介绍了Hunyuan3D 2.5，这是一个强大的3D扩散模型套件，旨在生成高保真且细节丰富的纹理化3D资产。Hunyuan3D 2.5基于其前身Hunyuan3D 2.0（Zhao等人，2025）和2.1（Hunyuan3D等人，2025）的两阶段流程构建，同时在形状生成和纹理合成方面展示了显著进步。

items.en: In the first stage of shape generation, we introduce a new shape foundation model – LATTICE, which has been trained on large-scale, high-quality datasets with increased model size and computational resources. We found that this new model exhibits stable improvement when scaling up the model. Benifit from these characteristics, our largest model generates detailed and sharp 3D shape with precise alignment to corresponding images while maintaining clean and smooth surfaces, significantly closing the gap between generated and handcrafted 3D shapes.
items.zh: 在形状生成的第一阶段，我们引入了一个新的形状基础模型——LATTICE，该模型在大规模高质量数据集上训练，并增加了模型规模和算力资源。我们发现，当扩展模型规模时，该新模型表现出稳定的改进。得益于这些特性，我们最大的模型能够生成细节丰富且清晰的3D形状，与对应图像精确对齐，同时保持表面干净光滑，显著缩小了生成形状与手工制作形状之间的差距。

items.en: In the second stage of texture generation, we extend the Hunyuan3D 2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025) and 2.1 (Hunyuan3D et al., 2025) texture generation model into a high-fidelity material generation framework. Adhering to the principled BRDF model, our approach produces multi-view albedo, roughness, and metallic maps simultaneously. This aims to precisely describe the surface reflection properties of generated 3D assets and accurately simulate geometric microsurface distributions, thereby achieving more realistic and detailed rendering results. Furthermore, we introduce a dual-phase resolution enhancement strategy to strengthen texture-geometry coordination, thereby improving end-to-end visual quality.
items.zh: 在纹理生成的第二阶段，我们将Hunyuan3D 2.0（Zhao等人，2025）和2.1（Hunyuan3D等人，2025）的纹理生成模型扩展为高保真材质生成框架。遵循基于原则的BRDF模型，我们的方法同时生成多视图反照率、粗糙度和金属度贴图。这旨在精确描述生成3D资产的表面反射特性，并准确模拟几何微表面分布，从而实现更真实和细节丰富的渲染结果。此外，我们引入了一种双阶段分辨率增强策略，以加强纹理与几何的协调性，从而提升端到端的视觉质量。

items.en: We perform extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations as well as user studies in terms of shape generation and end-to-end texture generation, across diverse range of in-the-wild input images. The results demonstrate that Hunyuan3D 2.5 outperforms state-of-the-art open-source and closed-source commercial models.
items.zh: 我们对形状生成和端到端纹理生成进行了广泛的定量和定性评估以及用户研究，涵盖了各种野外输入图像。结果表明，Hunyuan3D 2.5优于最先进的开源和闭源商业模型。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overview of Hunyuan3D 2.5 pipeline. It separates the 3D asset generation into two stages: first, it generates the shape, and then it creates the texture based on that shape.
items.capZh: 图3：Hunyuan3D 2.5流程概览。它将3D资产生成分为两个阶段：首先生成形状，然后基于该形状创建纹理。

items.en: Hunyuan3D 2.5 is an image-to-3D generation model, which follows the same overall architecture of Hunyuan3D 2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025), as shown in figure 3. In a nutshell, the input image is first processed by an image processor to remove the background and perform proper resizing. Then, a shape generation model is conditioned on the input image and generates the 3D mesh without texture. The mesh is further processed to extract normal, UV map, and etc. After that, a texture generation model is called to generate the texture with previous outputs.
items.zh: Hunyuan3D 2.5是一个图像到3D的生成模型，遵循与Hunyuan3D 2.0（Zhao等人，2025）相同的整体架构，如图3所示。简而言之，输入图像首先由图像处理器处理，去除背景并进行适当缩放。然后，形状生成模型以输入图像为条件，生成无纹理的3D网格。网格进一步处理以提取法线、UV贴图等。之后，调用纹理生成模型，利用之前的输出生成纹理。

items.en: Hunyuan3D 2.5 introduces a new shape generation model – LATTICE, which is a large-scale diffusion model capable of producing high-fidelity, detailed shapes with sharp edges and smooth surfaces from either a single image or four multi-view images. Trained on an extensive and high-quality 3D dataset featuring complex objects, the model is designed to generate exceptional detail. To ensure efficiency, we employ guidance and step distillation techniques to reduce inference time.
items.zh: Hunyuan3D 2.5引入了一个新的形状生成模型——LATTICE，这是一个大规模扩散模型，能够从单张图像或四张多视图图像生成高保真、细节丰富、边缘锐利且表面光滑的形状。该模型在包含复杂对象的大规模高质量3D数据集上训练，旨在生成卓越的细节。为确保效率，我们采用了引导和步骤蒸馏技术来减少推理时间。

items.en: Extreme Detail. Benfit from scaling up, Hunyuan3D 2.5 can generate fine-grained details at an unprecedented level. In the first row of figure 4, we present several examples generated by our model. As shown, the model achieves a level of accuracy approaching that of handcrafted designs, such as the correct number of fingers, the detailed bicycle wheel pattern, and even a bowl within a large scene.
items.zh: 极致细节。得益于规模扩展，Hunyuan3D 2.5能够以前所未有的水平生成精细细节。在图4的第一行中，我们展示了模型生成的几个示例。如图所示，模型达到了接近手工设计的精度，例如正确的手指数量、详细的自行车轮图案，甚至大场景中的一个碗。

items.en: Smooth Surfaces & Shape Edges. Existing models (Zhao et al., 2025; Li et al., 2025; Xiang et al., 2024) often struggle to generate sharp edges while maintaining smooth, clean surfaces, particularly for complex objects. In contrast, Hunyuan3D 2.5 strikes an excellent balance, as demonstrated in the second and third rows of figure 4.
items.zh: 光滑表面与形状边缘。现有模型（Zhao等人，2025；Li等人，2025；Xiang等人，2024）通常难以在生成锐利边缘的同时保持光滑干净的表面，特别是对于复杂对象。相比之下，Hunyuan3D 2.5实现了出色的平衡，如图4的第二行和第三行所示。

items.en: We propose a novel material generation framework in Hunyuan3D 2.5, which is extended on the foundation of multiview PBR texture generation architecture of hunyuan3D 2.1 (Hunyuan3D et al., 2025). As shown in figure 5, our model takes normal map and CCM rendered by 3D mesh as geometry conditions, and a reference image as guidance, generating high-quality PBR material maps as texture. We inherit 3D-aware RoPE in (Feng et al., 2025) to enhance cross-view consistency for seamless texture map generation.
items.zh: 我们在Hunyuan3D 2.5中提出了一种新颖的材质生成框架，该框架基于Hunyuan3D 2.1（Hunyuan3D等人，2025）的多视图PBR纹理生成架构扩展而来。如图5所示，我们的模型将法线贴图和由3D网格渲染的CCM作为几何条件，以参考图像为指导，生成高质量的PBR材质贴图作为纹理。我们继承了（Feng等人，2025）中的3D感知RoPE，以增强跨视图一致性，实现无缝纹理贴图生成。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Overview of material generation framework.

items.en: We introduce learnable embeddings for three material maps: albedo, MR, of which the MR channel is the combation expression of metallic and roughness. Specifically, three independent embeddings 𝐄albedo\mathbf{E}_{\text{albedo}}, 𝐄mr\mathbf{E}_{\text{mr}}, and 𝐄normal∈ℝ16×1024\mathbf{E}_{\text{normal}}\in\mathbb{R}^{16\times 1024} are initialized and subsequently injected into the respective channels via cross-attention layers. The embedding and attention modules are trainable, allowing the network to effectively model the distribution of three materials separately.
items.zh: 我们为三种材质贴图引入了可学习嵌入：反照率、MR，其中MR通道是金属度和粗糙度的组合表达。具体来说，三个独立的嵌入E_albedo、E_mr和E_normal∈ℝ^(16×1024)被初始化，随后通过交叉注意力层注入到各自的通道中。嵌入和注意力模块是可训练的，使网络能够分别有效建模三种材质的分布。

items.en: Although material channels exhibit significant domain gaps, maintaining spatial correspondence is crucial across different levels, from semantic to pixel-level alignment. To address this challenge, we propose a dual-channel attention mechanism that ensures spatial alignment among generated albedo and metallic-roughness (MR).
items.zh: 尽管材质通道存在显著的域差距，但在从语义到像素级对齐的不同层面上，保持空间对应关系至关重要。为解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种双通道注意力机制，确保生成的反照率和金属度-粗糙度（MR）之间的空间对齐。

items.en: After systematically examining the reference attention module, we found that the main cause of multi-channel misalignment lies in the misaligned attention masks. Therefore, we intentionally share the attention mask among multiple channels while varying the value computation in the output calculation. Specifically, since the basecolor branch contains the most semantically similar information to the reference image (both exist in the common RGB color space), we utilize the attention mask calculated from the basecolor channel and apply it to guide the reference attention in the other two branches, as formulated below:
items.zh: 在系统检查参考注意力模块后，我们发现多通道未对齐的主要原因在于注意力掩码未对齐。因此，我们有意在多个通道之间共享注意力掩码，同时在输出计算中改变值计算。具体来说，由于basecolor分支包含与参考图像最语义相似的信息（两者都存在于常见的RGB颜色空间中），我们利用从basecolor通道计算出的注意力掩码，并将其应用于指导其他两个分支的参考注意力，公式如下：

items.en: This design enables the generated albedo and MR features to maintain spatial coherence while being guided by the reference image's information. Building upon this framework, we incorporated an illumination-invariant consistency loss during training to enforce the disentanglement of material properties and illumination components. For more information, please refer to (He et al., 2025).
items.zh: 这种设计使得生成的反射率与MR特征能够在参考图像信息引导下保持空间一致性。在此框架基础上，我们在训练过程中引入了光照不变一致性损失，以强制解耦材质属性与光照成分。更多信息请参见(He et al., 2025)。

items.en: The alignment of textures with geometry critically impacts the visual integrity and aesthetic quality of 3D assets. However, achieving precise texture-geometry alignment presents considerable challenges, particularly for complex, high-polygon geometry. A key observation from our analysis is that higher-resolution images preserve richer high-frequency geometric details while mitigating VAE compression losses, thereby significantly enhancing geometric conditioning. Nevertheless, training with high-resolution multi-view images demands substantial memory resources, which necessitates reducing the number of views during training and consequently deteriorates the model's capability for dense-view inference.
items.zh: 纹理与几何的对齐对3D资产的视觉完整性和美学质量至关重要。然而，实现精确的纹理-几何对齐面临巨大挑战，尤其是在复杂高多边形几何体上。我们分析的一个关键观察是，更高分辨率的图像保留了更丰富的高频几何细节，同时减轻了VAE压缩损失，从而显著增强了几何条件。然而，使用高分辨率多视图图像训练需要大量内存资源，这迫使在训练期间减少视图数量，进而削弱了模型进行密集视图推理的能力。

items.en: To address this challenge, we propose a dual-phase resolution enhancement strategy that progressively improves texture-geometry alignment quality while maintaining computational feasibility. In the first phase, we employ a conventional multi-view training approach using 6-view 512×512 images, following the methodology of Hunyuan3D-2.0 Zhao et al. (2025). This phase establishes a solid foundation for multi-view consistency and basic texture-geometry correspondence.
items.zh: 为解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种双阶段分辨率增强策略，在保持计算可行性的同时逐步提升纹理-几何对齐质量。在第一阶段，我们采用常规的多视图训练方法，使用6视图512×512图像，遵循Hunyuan3D-2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025)的方法。该阶段为多视图一致性和基本的纹理-几何对应奠定了坚实基础。

items.en: In the second phase, we implement a zoom-in training strategy that enables the model to capture high-quality details while preserving the multi-view training benefits from the first phase. Specifically, we randomly zoom into both the reference image and multi-view generated images during training. This approach allows the model to learn fine-grained texture details without requiring full high-resolution training from scratch, thereby circumventing the memory constraints associated with direct high-resolution multi-view training.
items.zh: 在第二阶段，我们实施了一种缩放训练策略，使模型能够在保留第一阶段多视图训练收益的同时捕捉高质量细节。具体而言，我们在训练过程中随机缩放参考图像和多视图生成图像。这种方法使模型能够学习精细的纹理细节，而无需从头进行完整的高分辨率训练，从而规避了直接高分辨率多视图训练的内存限制。

items.en: During inference, we leverage multi-view images at up to 768×768 resolution, accelerated by the UniPC sampler (Zhao et al., 2023) for efficient high-quality generation.
items.zh: 在推理时，我们利用分辨率高达768×768的多视图图像，并通过UniPC采样器(Zhao et al., 2023)加速，实现高效的高质量生成。

items.en: To comprehensively assess the performance of Hunyuan3D 2.5, we performed evaluations from two key perspectives: (1) 3D shape generation, and (2) textured 3D asset generation.
items.zh: 为全面评估Hunyuan3D 2.5的性能，我们从两个关键角度进行了评估：(1) 3D形状生成，(2) 带纹理的3D资产生成。

items.en: Competing Methods. We compare with open-source baselines, Michelangelo (Zhao et al., 2024), Craftsman 1.5 (Li et al., 2024b), Trellis (Xiang et al., 2024), and Hunyuan3D-2 (Zhao et al., 2025), and closed-source baselines are Commerical Model 1, and Commerical Model 2.
items.zh: 对比方法。我们与开源基线方法Michelangelo (Zhao et al., 2024)、Craftsman 1.5 (Li et al., 2024b)、Trellis (Xiang et al., 2024)和Hunyuan3D-2 (Zhao et al., 2025)，以及闭源基线方法Commercial Model 1和Commercial Model 2进行了比较。

items.en: Metrics. To assess the performance of shape generation, we utilize ULIP (Xue et al., 2023) and Uni3D (Zhou et al., 2023) to calculate the similarity between the generated mesh and the input images (ULIP-I and Uni3D-I) as well as image prompts synthesized by the vision-language model (Chen et al., 2024b) (ULIP-T and Uni3D-T).
items.zh: 指标。为评估形状生成性能，我们使用ULIP (Xue et al., 2023)和Uni3D (Zhou et al., 2023)计算生成网格与输入图像(ULIP-I和Uni3D-I)以及由视觉语言模型(Chen et al., 2024b)合成的图像提示(ULIP-T和Uni3D-T)之间的相似度。

items.en: Comparison. We show the numerical comparison in table.1 and visual comparison in figure 6. It can be observed that our method achieves the best image-shape and text-shape similarities in terms of ULIP-T and Uni3D-T and Uni3D-I. Nevertheless, we noted that these metrics could not fully reflect the model capabilities. As shown in figure 6, our model actually perform much better than all other open-sourced and commerical models.
items.zh: 对比。我们在表1中展示了数值对比，在图6中展示了视觉对比。可以看出，我们的方法在ULIP-T、Uni3D-T和Uni3D-I指标上实现了最佳的图像-形状和文本-形状相似度。然而，我们注意到这些指标并不能完全反映模型能力。如图6所示，我们的模型实际上优于所有其他开源和商业模型。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visual comparison of different methods in terms of shape generation.
items.capZh: 图6：不同方法在形状生成方面的视觉对比。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Visual comparison of different methods in terms of texture generation. We compared the front and back of models generated by different methods, as well as the effects of the corresponding complete material maps and albedo maps.
items.capZh: 图7：不同方法在纹理生成方面的视觉对比。我们比较了不同方法生成模型的前后视图，以及相应的完整材质贴图和反射率贴图的效果。

items.en: Competing Methods. We perform quantitive comparison with text- and image-conditioned methods, including Text2Tex Chen et al. (2023a), Paint3D Zeng et al. (2024a), Paint-it Youwang et al. (2024), SyncMVD Liu et al. (2024a), and TexGen Yu et al. (2024). Furthermore, we show qualitive comparison on closed-source commercial models.
items.zh: 对比方法。我们与基于文本和图像条件的方法进行了定量比较，包括Text2Tex (Chen et al., 2023a)、Paint3D (Zeng et al., 2024a)、Paint-it (Youwang et al., 2024)、SyncMVD (Liu et al., 2024a)和TexGen (Yu et al., 2024)。此外，我们还与闭源商业模型进行了定性比较。

items.en: Metrics. We use Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), CLIP-based FID (CLIP-FID), and Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) to measure the similarity between the generated textures and the ground truth. CLIP Maximum-Mean Discrepancy (CMMD) is used to assess the diversity and richness of the generated texture details. And CLIP-Image Similarity (CLIP-I) is employed to evaluate how well the generated textures semantically align with the input images (for image prompt methods).
items.zh: 指标。我们使用Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)、基于CLIP的FID (CLIP-FID)和Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS)来衡量生成纹理与真实纹理之间的相似度。使用CLIP最大均值差异(CMMD)评估生成纹理细节的多样性和丰富性。使用CLIP图像相似度(CLIP-I)评估生成纹理与输入图像(对于图像提示方法)的语义对齐程度。

items.en: Comparison. We show the numerical comparison in table.2 and visual comparison in figure 7, For an intuitive comparison, we directly show the end-to-end results. It can be observed that for PBR material generation, competing models struggle to accurately estimate the correct MR (metallic and roughness) values, and face challenges in decoupling the inherent illumination effects in the input images for the albedo component.
items.zh: 对比。我们在表2中展示了数值对比，在图7中展示了视觉对比。为直观比较，我们直接展示了端到端结果。可以看出，对于PBR材质生成，对比模型难以准确估计正确的MR(金属度和粗糙度)值，并且在将输入图像中的固有光照效应从反射率分量中解耦时面临挑战。

items.en: User Study. We also conducted a user study to evaluate human preferences for generated textured models using different methods. In this study, each participant was asked to rank each method for each sample in the testset. The testset included a diverse range of real-world images from various categories. As shown in figure 8, we compared our method with three different commercial models. The results clearly demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the others. For instance, in the image-to-3D task, our method achieved a 72% win rate, which is 9 times higher than that of Commercial Model 1.
items.zh: 用户研究。我们还进行了一项用户研究，以评估人类对不同方法生成的带纹理模型的偏好。在这项研究中，每位参与者被要求对测试集中每个样本的每种方法进行排序。测试集包含来自不同类别的多样化真实世界图像。如图8所示，我们将我们的方法与三种不同的商业模型进行了比较。结果清楚地表明，我们的方法显著优于其他方法。例如，在图像到3D任务中，我们的方法达到了72%的胜率，是Commercial Model 1的9倍。

items.en: 3D shape generation has advanced rapidly in recent years. Early works (Wu et al., 2016; Sanghi et al., 2022; Yan et al., 2022; Yin et al., 2023) based on different generative models (Kingma, 2013; Goodfellow et al., 2014; Papamakarios et al., 2021) demonstrated the preliminary potential for generating specific categories of shapes. With the rise of diffusion models (Rombach et al., 2022; Ho et al., 2020), 3D shape generation methods based on score distillation (Poole et al., 2023) have been introduced, enabling text-to-3D generation by leveraging text-to-image models. Feedforward methods such as LRM (Hong et al., 2023), Hunyuan3D 1.0 (Yang et al., 2024) and LGM (Tang et al., 2024) represent another line of research focused on generating 3D assets in a single step. Recently, native 3D diffusion models have significantly improved generation quality by utilizing 3D data. Notable works in this area include Michelangelo (Zhao et al., 2024), CLAY (Zhang et al., 2024b), Trellis (Xiang et al., 2024), Hunyuan3D 2.0 Zhao et al. (2025), and TripoSG (Li et al., 2025), among others. Although multi-step sampling is required, native 3D diffusion models based on vecset Zhang et al. (2023) can be accelerated via FlashVDM (Lai et al., 2025), achieving speeds that surpass even feedforward methods. On the other hand, autoregressive models, such as MeshGPT (Siddiqui et al., 2024) BPT (Weng et al., 2024), and Meshtron (Hao et al., 2024) have become popular for mesh generation with human-like topology.
items.zh: 近年来，3D形状生成取得了快速发展。早期基于不同生成模型(Kingma, 2013; Goodfellow et al., 2014; Papamakarios et al., 2021)的工作(Wu et al., 2016; Sanghi et al., 2022; Yan et al., 2022; Yin et al., 2023)展示了生成特定类别形状的初步潜力。随着扩散模型(Rombach et al., 2022; Ho et al., 2020)的兴起，基于分数蒸馏(Poole et al., 2023)的3D形状生成方法被引入，通过利用文本到图像模型实现了文本到3D生成。前馈方法如LRM (Hong et al., 2023)、Hunyuan3D 1.0 (Yang et al., 2024)和LGM (Tang et al., 2024)代表了另一条专注于单步生成3D资产的研究路线。最近，原生3D扩散模型通过利用3D数据显著提升了生成质量。该领域的著名工作包括Michelangelo (Zhao et al., 2024)、CLAY (Zhang et al., 2024b)、Trellis (Xiang et al., 2024)、Hunyuan3D 2.0 (Zhao et al., 2025)和TripoSG (Li et al., 2025)等。尽管需要多步采样，但基于vecset (Zhang et al., 2023)的原生3D扩散模型可以通过FlashVDM (Lai et al., 2025)加速，速度甚至超过前馈方法。另一方面，自回归模型如MeshGPT (Siddiqui et al., 2024)、BPT (Weng et al., 2024)和Meshtron (Hao et al., 2024)在具有类人拓扑的网格生成中变得流行。

items.capEn: Figure 8: User study against three latest commerical models in terms of end-to-end textured results.
items.capZh: 图8：针对三种最新商业模型在端到端带纹理结果上的用户研究。

items.en: Multiview diffusion (Zhao et al., 2025; Huang et al., 2024b; Vainer et al., 2024b; Li et al., 2024a; Tang et al., 2025; Long et al., 2024; Wang & Shi, 2023; Shi et al., 2023b; a; Liu et al., 2023), which primarily introduce cross-view attention mechanisms to modeling multi-view latent interactions, has opened up new avenues for addressing the global consistency issue of 3D textures. Zero123++ (Shi et al., 2023a) spatially concatenates multi-view images and utilizes the self-attention to build up cross-view interaction. Other works inject view constraints into the attention block using diverse attention masks (Tang et al., 2023; Huang et al., 2024b; Li et al., 2024a). For PBR material generation, existing methods mainly include three categories: Generation-based approaches Vainer et al. (2024a); Sartor & Peers (2023); Vecchio et al. (2024); Chen et al. (2024a); Zeng et al. (2024b) leverage diffusion models to learn material priors and recover PBR properties through physical rendering; retrieval-based techniques Zhang et al. (2024c); Fang et al. (2024) adapt pre-built material graphs from libraries to ensure visual consistency and editability; optimization-based methods Chen et al. (2023b); Zhang et al. (2024d); Wu et al. (2023); Xu et al. (2023); Yeh et al. (2024); Youwang et al. (2024); Liu et al. (2024b) first generate initial textures and then refine them through techniques like Score-Distillation Sampling Poole et al. (2023).
items.zh: 多视图扩散(Zhao et al., 2025; Huang et al., 2024b; Vainer et al., 2024b; Li et al., 2024a; Tang et al., 2025; Long et al., 2024; Wang & Shi, 2023; Shi et al., 2023b; a; Liu et al., 2023)主要引入跨视图注意力机制来建模多视图潜在交互，为解决3D纹理的全局一致性问题开辟了新途径。Zero123++ (Shi et al., 2023a)在空间上拼接多视图图像，并利用自注意力建立跨视图交互。其他工作通过使用不同的注意力掩码将视图约束注入注意力块(Tang et al., 2023; Huang et al., 2024b; Li et al., 2024a)。对于PBR材质生成，现有方法主要包括三类：基于生成的方法(Vainer et al., 2024a; Sartor & Peers, 2023; Vecchio et al., 2024; Chen et al., 2024a; Zeng et al., 2024b)利用扩散模型学习材质先验，并通过物理渲染恢复PBR属性；基于检索的技术(Zhang et al., 2024c; Fang et al., 2024)从库中适配预构建的材质图，以确保视觉一致性和可编辑性；基于优化的方法(Chen et al., 2023b; Zhang et al., 2024d; Wu et al., 2023; Xu et al., 2023; Yeh et al., 2024; Youwang et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024b)首先生成初始纹理，然后通过分数蒸馏采样(Poole et al., 2023)等技术进行细化。

items.en: In this work, we presented Hunyuan3D 2.5, an advanced suite of 3D diffusion models for generating high-quality, detailed 3D assets. By introducing a new shape foundation model and extending texture generation with physical-based rendering (PBR), Hunyuan3D 2.5 achieves remarkable improvements in both shape fidelity and texture realism. Extensive evaluations show that Hunyuan3D 2.5 outperforms current state-of-the-art models in terms of shape detail, surface smoothness, and texture consistency. This work marks a significant advancement in the 3D generation field, providing a powerful tool for creating realistic and detailed 3D assets across various industries.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了Hunyuan3D 2.5，这是一个先进的3D扩散模型套件，用于生成高质量、细节丰富的3D资产。通过引入新的形状基础模型并扩展基于物理渲染(PBR)的纹理生成，Hunyuan3D 2.5在形状保真度和纹理真实感方面取得了显著改进。大量评估表明，Hunyuan3D 2.5在形状细节、表面平滑度和纹理一致性方面优于当前最先进的模型。这项工作标志着3D生成领域的重大进步，为各行各业创建逼真且详细的3D资产提供了强大工具。

items.en: Shape Generation: Zeqiang Lai, Yunfei Zhao, Jingwei Huang, Haolin Liu, Zibo Zhao, Qingxiang Lin, Huiwen Shi, Xianghui Yang
items.zh: 形状生成：Zeqiang Lai, Yunfei Zhao, Jingwei Huang, Haolin Liu, Zibo Zhao, Qingxiang Lin, Huiwen Shi, Xianghui Yang

items.en: Texture Generation: Mingxin Yang, Shuhui Yang, Yifei Feng, Sheng Zhang, Xin Huang
items.zh: 纹理生成：杨明欣、杨书慧、冯逸飞、张晟、黄鑫

items.en: Di Luo, Fan Yang, Fang Yang, Lifu Wang, Sicong Liu, Yixuan Tang, Yulin Cai, Zebin He, Tian Liu, Yuhong Liu
items.zh: 罗迪、杨帆、杨芳、王立夫、刘思聪、唐逸轩、蔡玉林、何泽彬、刘天、刘宇宏
